nuggets.headline: Xmane's pervasive collaboration across Pete Rango's Savage Planet album
nuggets.text: While "Oms at Play" features Xmane, their collaborative efforts extend across the entire *Savage Planet* album. Xmane is credited on all three tracks of the 2022 release, including "Traag Park" and "Planet X", indicating a deep creative partnership that defined the album's sound. This consistent presence highlights Xmane's integral role in crafting the musical landscape of Pete Rango's "Savage Planet".

nuggets.imageCaption: The striking album cover for Pete Rango's 2022 release, "Savage Planet".

nuggets.headline: Pete Rango's Savage Planet album saw its full release in late 2022
nuggets.text: The three-track *Savage Planet* album, featuring "Oms at Play", was released in 2022. While the album itself debuted that year, a specific track from the project, "Planet X," was released on October 28, 2022. The album was released under XUE RECORDS and distributed by Venice Music, marking the official channels through which Pete Rango's work reached listeners.

nuggets.headline: explore more from Pete Rango's frequent collaborator Xmane, including their 2025 EP "S.E.N.D."
nuggets.text: If you're drawn to the contributions of Xmane on "Oms at Play", delve into their solo catalog, which includes the 2025 EP "S.E.N.D.". Beyond their work with Pete Rango, Xmane has released several projects, such as the 2023 single "VILLAIN" and the 2025 track "Toxicoman (Official Audio)". Their discography on platforms like TIDAL offers a comprehensive look at their individual artistic output.

artistSummary: Pete Rango is an artist known for his 2022 album "Savage Planet," which features significant contributions from collaborator Xmane. His discography also includes EPs such as "Dreamvibe," "Breakdown," and "WILD LIFE EP."
